title: Wu Cycle State
description: Top-level state for a wu development cycle, stored at .wu/state.json

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the cycle was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state mutation

description.description: Human-readable description of the cycle goal
examples: Add JWT authentication middleware to the API gateway

current_phase.description: The phase the cycle is currently in

status.description: Overall lifecycle status of the cycle
